data.name: Chuyện Nhà Cha
data.overview: Ông trùm Cha Seung Won cầm đầu một băng đảng đầy bất ổn với sự kề vai sát cánh của các đàn em trái tính trái nết gồm Choo Sung Hoon, DinDin, Danny Koo và Tommy. Với tham vọng lớn lao là điều chế một loại nước chấm cay tuyệt hảo, Cha dẫn đàn em lên đường chu du khắp châu Á để truy lùng những hương vị cay mới lạ.

data.biography:
Wu Jifeng is a musician and actor born in Benxi, Liaoning, China. He began studying calligraphy at an early age.

After watching an EXO performance in high school, he dreamed of joining a boy group, but his parents opposed it. As a result, he decided to major in Japanese at Southwest Minzu University after high school.

He pursued his dream by becoming a trainee at ETM Academy. Later, he appeared on "Produce Camp 2019" , where he reached the finals and ranked 20th overall. During this time, he also participated in the "Super Nova Games."
data.name: Wu Jifeng

data.biography: Beau Garrett is an American actress and model. She began her career appearing in GUESS advertisements in the late 1990s after being discovered by an Elite modeling agent at age fourteen.
data.name: Beau Garrett

data.biography:
Beau Garrett (Beverly Hills, Kalifornia, 1982. december 28. –) amerikai színésznő és modell.

Beau Kalifornában, Topanga városban nőtt fel szüleivel és nővérével. A család számos kutyát tartott, a későbbi színésznő itt kedvelte meg a lovakat is.

Dolgozott a GUESS márkának az 1990-es évek végén, majd a Revlon kozmetikumok számára modellkedett Halle Berry-hez és Eva Mendes-hez hasonlóan.

Színészként a Végzetes kitérő című horrorfilmben debütált 2006-ban. Egy évvel később Frankie Raye-t alakította A Fantasztikus Négyes és az Ezüst Utazó című filmben. 2011-ben a Gyilkos elmék: Alapos Gyanú 12 epizódjában szerepelt.
博·杰西·加勒特（Beau Jesse Garrett，1982年12月28日-），美国女演员、模特。
data.name: 博·杰西·加勒特

data.biography: 博·傑西·加勒特（Beau Jesse Garrett，1982 年 12 月 28 日-），美國女演員、模特。
data.name: 博·傑西·加勒特

data.biography: D.J. Demers is a Canadian stand-up comedian, best known for his television appearances on season 11 of America's Got Talent and on the late night talk show Conan. Originally from Kitchener, Ontario, Demers was diagnosed with hearing loss in childhood, and focuses his comedy largely but not exclusively on his experiences as a person who wears hearing aids.
data.name: D.J. Demers
